member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to 600.

member.name: T:Resources.Message
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.AccessDenied
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Access Denied!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.AlreadyExists
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Already Exists!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.AtLeastOneSelection
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Please Select At Least One Selection..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.Between
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Must be Between {1} and {2}.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.ConditionEmpty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The condition is empty..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.ConfirmDeleteConditionMsg
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Are you going to delete the search condition?.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.ContainValue
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Must Be {1} or {2}.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.ContinueWithoutCondition
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Continue without search condition?.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.DataNoReady
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Data No Ready - {0}.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.DataNotDefine
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Data In {0} Table Not Defined!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.DataTypeError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Must be {1}.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.DateDDMMMYYYYFormat
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid Date Format. e.g. 01-Feb-2001.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.DateDDMMYYYYFormat
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0}, Invalid Date Format. e.g. 28-02-2013!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.DateYYYYMMFormat
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid Account Month Format. (YYYYMM).

member.name: P:Resources.Message.DeleteConfirmation
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Are you sure want to delete this record?.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.Deletemessage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Please Choose Yes to confirm delete.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.Duplicate
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Duplicate {0}!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.ErrorHeader
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Warning :.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.Failed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Failed!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.FieldEmpty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Cannot be Empty!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.FieldFormatAlphanumericError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} must in Alphanumeric Format!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.FieldFormatNumericError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} must in Numeric Format!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.FinGoodsTransferActionStoped
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Finished Goods Transfer Note {0}, {1} Not Allowed! Note Already Closed..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.FinGoodsTransferItemEmpty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No Items Found, At Least 1 Item Must Be Filled..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.FinGoodsTransferItemQtyZero
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid Item No {0} Quantity, Transfer Quantity Must Greater Than 0..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.FinGoodsTransferMonthEndClosed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Finished Goods Transfer, {0} Not Allowed! Month-End Closing Already Run..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.FinGoodsTransferPalletQtyZero
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid Pallet No {0} Quantity, Pallet Quantity Must Greater Than 0..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.InvalidAdvanceSearch
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid character for advance search.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.InvalidBasicSearch
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid character for basic search.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.InvalidItemNo_ReceivedLot
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid Receiving Lot and Item, Existing Lot {0} for Specified Item {1} Not Found!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.InvalidPasswordUserName
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid {0}.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.InvalidProcess
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid Process!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.InvalidSelect
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid Selection.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.MasterMaintenanceRecordNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid {0}, Record Not Found In Master Table..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.OnlyOneSelection
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Please Select Only One Selection..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.PleaseEnter
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Please Enter {0} !.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.RangeError
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Must be {1} {2}.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.RawMatlBaleUsageActionStoped
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bale Usage Situation Lot {0}, {1} Not Allowed! Lot Already Issues..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.RawMatlItemNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid Raw Material, Item No {0} Not Found..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.RawMatlRequisitionActionStoped
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Raw Material Requisition Lot {0}, {1} Not Allowed! Lot Already Received..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.RawMatlRequisitionLotItemEmpty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to No Items Found, At Least 1 Lot Item Must Be Filled..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.RawMatlRequisitionLotReqBaleZero
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid Lot No {0} Bale, Requested Bale Must Greater Than 0..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.RawMatlRequisitionLotReqWeightZero
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Invalid Lot No {0} Weight, Requested Weight Must Greater Than 0..

member.name: P:Resources.Message.RecordNotExists
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Does Not Exists!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.RecordNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Record Not Found!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.Successfully
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} Successfully!.

member.name: P:Resources.Message.SystemFailed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Warning! System Error!.

member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Resources.Print.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Resources.PrintTitle.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Resources.PrintTitle.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Resources.PrintTitle.MM_APPROVE
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Type Code.

member.name: T:Resources.RE
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Resources.RE.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Resources.RE.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Resources.RE.DateDDMMMYYYFormat
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ^(([0-9])|([0-2][0-9])|([3][0-1]))-(Jan|Feb|Mar|Apr|May|Jun|Jul|Aug|Sep|Oct|Nov|Dec)-\d{4}$.

member.name: P:Resources.RE.DateYYYYMM
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to 20[0-9]\d(0[1-9]|1[0-2]).

member.name: P:Resources.RE.FourDecimalFormat
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ^[0-9]\d{0,}(\.\d{1,4})*$.

member.name: P:Resources.RE.NormalTextFormat
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ^[0-9a-zA-Z@#$%^&+=?!_,\-\s/\\."()~{}\[\]:*;]*$.

member.name: P:Resources.RE.NumberFormat
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ^[0-9]*$.

member.name: P:Resources.RE.StringFormat
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ^[a-zA-Z0-9-\s,/\\.]*$.

member.name: P:Resources.RE.TwoDecimalFormat
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to ^[0-9]\d{0,}(\.\d{1,2})*$.

member.name: T:Resources.SearchSource
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_COMM_FIELD
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [{"Text":"Code","Value":"CODE"},{"Text":"Description","Value":"CODE_DESC"}].

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_COMPANY
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [{"Text":"Company Code", "Value":"COMPANYCODE"},{"Text":"Company Name", "Value":"COMPANYNAME"},{"Text":"Address", "Value":"ADDRESS"},{"Text":"Email Address", "Value":"EMAIL"}].

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_Email_Group
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [ {"Text":"Section", "Value":"SEC_DESC"}, {"Text":"Email Group Name", "Value":"EMAIL_GROUP_NAME"}, {"Text":"Email Group Description", "Value":"EMAIL_GROUP_DESC"}].

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_Email_List
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [{"Text":"Email Group Description", "Value":"EMAIL_GROUP_DESC"} ].

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_Equipment
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [{"Text":"Carrier Code", "Value":"EQUIPMENT_CODE"}, {"Text":"Carrier Name", "Value":"EQUIPMENT_NAME"}].

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_Equipment_Reg
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [ {"Text":"Carrier Name", "Value":"EQUIPMENT_NAME"},{"Text":"RFID Type", "Value":"RFID_TYPE"}, {"Text":"Batch ID", "Value":"BATCH_ID"}, {"Text":"RFID ID", "Value":"ID_RFID"}, {"Text":"RFID ID 2", "Value":"ID_RFID_2"}].

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_Mac_Cond
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [{"Text":"Setup","Value":"setup"}, {"Text":"Section","Value":"Section"}, {"Text":"Process","Value":"Process"}].

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [{"Text":"PC1", "Value":"PC1"},{"Text":"Description", "Value":"DESCRIPTION"}].

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_PC2
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [{"Text":"PC2", "Value":"PC2"},{"Text":"Thickness", "Value":"THICKNESS"},{"Text":"Type", "Value":"TYPE"},{"Text":"Width", "Value":"WIDTH"},{"Text":"Length", "Value":"LENGTH"},{"Text":"Packing Code", "Value":"PACK_CODE"},{"Text":"Grade", "Value":"GRADE"},{"Text":"Unit Weight", "Value":"UNIT_WEIGHT"}].

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [{"Text":"PC2", "Value":"PC2M"},{"Text":"Thickness", "Value":"THICKNESS"},{"Text":"Type", "Value":"TYPE"},{"Text":"Width", "Value":"WIDTH"},{"Text":"Length", "Value":"LENGTH"},{"Text":"Packing Code", "Value":"PACK_CODE"},{"Text":"Machine", "Value":"MACHINE"}, {"Text":"Unit Weight", "Value":"UNIT_WEIGHT"}].

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_RFID_LOC_AREA

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_RFID_LOC_READER_REG

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_RFID_Type
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [{"Text":"RFID Type", "Value":"RFID_TYPE"}].

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_ST_CONTROL
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to [{"Text":"Chop No","Value":"CHOP_NO"}].

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.MM_USER

member.name: P:Resources.SearchSource.PC2_LOTNO

member.name: T:UserControl_GridHeader
member.summary:
Add User Control
Additional ---------------------------------------- If the URL does not contain the Sort Direction and Sort Field then will generate and redirect to default value
Remark: Based on previous version and modified the way of the binding ---------------------------------------- C.C.Yeon 25 April 2011 Modified

member.name: T:Search
member.summary:
Search User Control Handler Basic Search and Advanced Search
Remark: Based on previous version and modified the way of the binding ---------------------------------------- C.C.Yeon 25 April 2011 Modified

member.name: T:Control.Base
member.summary:
Handler All Page Common Function 1 ) Retrieve and Determine Key 2 ) Retrieve and Determine Action(Insert / Update / Delete) 3 ) Generate (Insert / Edit / Delete / List / View ) URL Based on the Setup Key 4 ) Generete Title Based on the Setup Key 5 ) Generate Action Desc 6 ) Retrieve and Determine Sort Field , Sort Direction 7 ) Generate the List View URL (Include Sort Field , Sort Value and Page No ) 8 ) Function Control property , Default = true , if false all the generate list will not auto generate, this is to igone the error wish the page doest not have setting in the resource page 9 ) Delete Control property , Default = true, if false then the show deleted Check box will be disappear.
Remark : The default sort property will determine wherether the url is check or not check ( if the url failed retrieve the sort field then will generete and redirect its ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- C.C.Yeon 25 April 2011 initial Version C.C.Yeon 12 May 2011 Add FucntionControl Property

member.summary: Retrieve the Detail Path

member.summary: Retrieve Title

member.summary: Retrieve List Page

member.summary: Retrieve Log Page

member.summary: Retrieve other path based on the key

member.summary: Retrieve Print Page Path
